description: Responsum or responsa. Naming specific people instead of the usual "Reʾuven" and "Shimʿon" or "fulān." At least on verso, the case has to do with the claims of the wife of Ṣāʿid against the wife of al-Rayyis al-ʿAjamī and an orphan. Awaiting fuller description.
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
